For me it's beautiful, if you do it

In the long run.
If you do it in one year, you

This reasoning, in my opinion, if it's done

Zieliński and Di Marco, if you play a

It completely fails when it says, I'm going

for a penalty at the 90th minute, the

I make fun of it.

makes me say, damn it, it makes me
say, damn it, because if we are capable,
we ourselves, and for us, in this case,
to say such nonsense, then at this point
I also have to understand all those others
who say nonsensical things about Serie A, for

And it's sad, it's sad, I repeat, to

on what was the elimination and why this

of the return, giving the compromise of the

metadata.title: LE DICHIARAZIONI di BARELLA sono UN PUGNO NELLO STOMACO‼️
